channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Bins overflowing on to pavement, 20th March
item.description:
Bins overflowing on to pavement and rubbish dumped and spilling out on to public pavement. Please arrange for the bins to be emptied. This area is a dumping ground and it is only four metres wide and attached to the public pavement. I saw someone we else reported this last week but nothing has been done as Nd their request has been removed!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sherman Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Untaxed, 20th March
item.description:
Untaxed car

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-7, Ditton Place, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped mattress, 20th March
item.description:
Mattress dumped on Birchdene Drive.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Birchdene Drive, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tipping on Rainton Road, 20th March
item.description:
Hi there, There is a broken chair abandoned at the top of Rainton road - please address it asap. Thanks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Gurdon Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish and broken glass all over the pavement, 20th March
item.description:
There’s a lot of rubbish and glass all up the pavement and in amongst piles of leaf litter along the side of the road
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tunnel Avenue, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tipping on under the pedestrian bridge towards Westcombe Park, 20th March
item.description:
Hi there, Looks like someone started to use this area as fly-tipping again. Last year the council removed the significant fly-tipping from.that area. Please remove the fly-tipping and add signage to warm of fly-tipping being a crime, which least to fines etc. Thanks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Combedale Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Part of tree snapped off and partially blocking path, 20th March
item.description:
New River Path entrance on Barrowell Green

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Barrowell Green, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large amount of rubbish causing environmental hazard, 20th March
item.description:
The driveway between no 61 and no 60 Sunset Road had a lot of rubbish dumped there. I have seen vermin and this needs to be removed. This area is consistently being used to dump rubbish for a very long time. Over a year. It is not ok for neighbours to have to live with this. Please can this be removed and the residents spoken to regarding this.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sunset Road, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped car not mot since sept 2025, 20th March
item.description:
Getting a lot of cars dumped in this area taking up parking spaces

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cornwallis Close, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car outside my house, 20th March
item.description:
This car has been abandoned and left outside my house for a year now and I would like it to be moved. It is full of rubbish and attracts pest. The car doesn’t not have an MOT and is on the road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hartford Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish, 20th March
item.description:
I cleaned up some of the scattered rubbish but there is too much for me to carry as a street friend. It mostly comprises food waste and cardboard plus plastic.I needs cleaning up quickly or it will scatter along the grass verge.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Worsley Bridge Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Between Donaldson and Lynton on Victoria Road, 20th March
item.description:
Dumped fridge

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Donaldson Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.description:
Shortlands gardens and chart close look discusting rubbish and broken glass everywhere

item.description:
2x fridges

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Walm Lane, London

item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Rainwater running onto pavement at a crossover and not flowing down the gutter, 20th March
item.description:
The poor state of the kerbstones and pavement means that water is running onto the pavement. This is made worse by the condition of the pavement as large puddles form making the pavement impassable. The pictures were taken in January but the issue is long-standing. The crossover is at no. 40.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ulleswater Road, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Verge destroyed by heavy vehicles, 20th March
item.description:
Contractor working on Woodcroft - nos 28 or 30? Heavy vehicles have destroyed the verge

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woodcroft, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Faded dog sign, 20th March
item.description:
Faded cant see dogs pooing

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 94, Brantwood Way, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Persistent flytipping, 20th March
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 38, Mountbatten Close, West Norwood, Greater London
